title: texas war of independence
subject: texas war of independence
program_outcome: This syllabus explores the Texas War of Independence, examining its causes, key events, figures, cultural impacts, and folklore.

classes.title: Introduction to the Texicans
classes.summary: This class introduces the Texicans, their origins, and their role in Texas history.
terminal: Identify who the Texicans were and their significance in Texas history
enabling: Define the term 'Texicans'
Describe the origins of the Texicans
Explain the socio-political context of the Texicans in early Texas

classes.title: Causes of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class covers the key causes that led to the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: List and explain the main causes of the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Discuss the political tensions between Texas settlers and the Mexican government
Identify economic factors contributing to the conflict
Describe cultural differences that fueled the desire for independence

classes.title: Major Battles of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class reviews the major battles during the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Describe the key battles and their outcomes during the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Identify major battles such as the Battle of Gonzales and the Battle of the Alamo
Explain the significance of each battle in the context of the war
Discuss the strategies and tactics used by both sides

classes.title: Historical Figures of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class examines the prominent figures involved in the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Identify and describe the contributions of key figures in the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Discuss the roles of figures such as Sam Houston, Stephen F. Austin, and Santa Anna
Explain the impact of these figures on the war's outcome
Analyze the leadership qualities of these historical figures

classes.title: The Yellow Rose of Texas and Texas Folklore
classes.summary: This class explores the folklore and cultural narratives surrounding the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Explain the significance of 'The Yellow Rose of Texas' and other folklore in Texas culture
enabling: Discuss the story behind 'The Yellow Rose of Texas'
Identify other folklore and legends from the Texas War of Independence
Analyze how these stories reflect cultural values and historical events

classes.title: Cultural Impacts of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class investigates the cultural impacts of the Texas War of Independence on Texas and the broader region.
terminal: Analyze the cultural impacts of the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Identify changes in cultural identity post-independence
Discuss the influence of the war on Texas art, music, and literature
Explore the lasting effects on Texas-Mexico relations

classes.title: The Republic of Texas
classes.summary: This class covers the establishment and challenges of the Republic of Texas post-independence.
terminal: Describe the formation and challenges faced by the Republic of Texas
enabling: Explain the political structure of the Republic of Texas
Discuss the economic and diplomatic challenges it faced
Analyze the reasons for its eventual annexation by the United States
